message:
feat(mermaid): add gitGraph layout + render lanes (bd-hudcn.1.7.2)

Add specialized gitGraph layout with lane assignment per branch,
chronological commit ordering, and merge edge routing. Add branch
lane rendering in mermaid_render.rs alongside existing sequence
lifeline support. Also includes compatibility matrix refresh for
gitGraph/journey/requirement (Unsupported -> Partial).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
